name: Visiomed Group SA
summary: Visiomed Group SA develops and distributes electronic medical devices in Europe and internationally. It provides thermometers, blood pressure monitors, pulse oximeters, connected blood glucometers, and connected electrocardiograms; and pain relief products, such as electrotherapy. The company also offers connected scales and scalable baby scales, as well as prevention and treatment products, such as humidifiers and phototherapies. In addition, it provides hearing products and optics, including presbycusis, as well as family hygiene products. The company offers its products under the ThermoFlash, T. LeClerc, Visiocheck, Innoxa, and BewellConnect brands. Visiomed Group SA was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
